decks.notes: This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure through aggressive creatures like Ragavan and Phelia. It utilizes removal spells like Solitude and Galvanic Discharge to control the board and protect its own threats. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption and tempo advantage, while Consign to Memory and Arena of Glory offer card advantage and resource management. The deck's versatility and ability to adapt to different matchups make it a formidable force in the Modern format, punishing opponents who rely heavily on their mana base and noncreature spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting to enable the powerful delve and graveyard synergies of the deck. Dragon's Rage Channeler and Hollow One benefit from having cards in the graveyard, while Nethergoyf becomes a massive threat. The deck also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt for additional reach, as well as Detective's Phoenix for recurring threats. Overall, the deck aims to be fast and aggressive, overwhelming opponents with early threats and graveyard shenanigans.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp, it can repeatedly trigger powerful abilities from creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. The combination of disruption spells like Thoughtseize and removal spells like Fatal Push allows the deck to control the game and make it difficult for the opponent to execute their strategy. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a fast and aggressive strategy, combining the Affinity mechanic with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By using cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble for acceleration and card draw, along with powerful artifacts like Arcbound Ravager and Thought Monitor, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with a combination of threats and disruption. With the ability to generate mana quickly and protect key pieces with cards like Welding Jar, the deck aims to establish an early advantage and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to apply early pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, supported by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional utility and support for the aggressive game plan. The deck also includes disruption elements like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos to help control the board and prevent the opponent from mounting a defense. Overall, the deck aims to quickly outpace the opponent and overwhelm them with efficient threats.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disruption and removal to control the opponent's board and hand. Utilizing counterspells, removal spells like Fatal Push and Sheoldred's Edict, and disruptive creatures, the deck aims to maintain control of the game while digging for key cards with Consult the Star Charts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. With a mix of reactive spells and proactive threats, the deck seeks to grind out victories by outlasting the opponent's resources and overwhelming them with card advantage and efficient answers.

The deck focuses on using cards that cycle or have cascade abilities to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures, then cast Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a large number of creatures and disrupt their game plan with disruptive spells like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor. The deck aims to win the game through sheer board presence and control elements, while utilizing the combo potential of Living End to gain a significant advantage.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through powerful cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Thought-Knot Seer, while utilizing the UrzaTron lands to ramp up for huge threats like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Kozilek, Butcher of Truth. The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Dismember and Kozilek's Command, while also maintaining a strong board presence with Eldrazi creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and control the game until victory.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mix of powerful creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing efficient creatures like Territorial Kavu and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with powerful support cards like Leyline of the Guildpact and Lightning Bolt, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Stubborn Denial and Leyline Binding helps to protect your creatures and disrupt your opponent's strategy. Overall, this deck is built to be fast, versatile, and disruptive in order to secure victory.

This Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on utilizing artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up quickly and overwhelm opponents with a combination of powerful creatures like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager, along with disruptive cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. The deck also includes cards like Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing to create more artifact tokens and generate additional value. With a mix of aggression and resource management, this deck aims to outpace opponents and maintain control of the battlefield.

This Grixis Control deck focuses on utilizing a mix of spells and creatures to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Snapcaster Mage and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian to provide additional card advantage and pressure. In addition, the deck includes versatile cards like Cling to Dust and Sheoldred's Edict to disrupt graveyard strategies. The key strategy is to control the game through disruption and card advantage until the opponent is overwhelmed.

The deck focuses on utilizing the UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger. It also utilizes Karn, the Great Creator to search for powerful artifacts like Trinisphere and Vexing Bauble to disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck also includes control elements like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Sire of Seven Deaths to control the board and finish off opponents. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm opponents with powerful threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing a diverse range of aggressive creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. With a mix of powerful creatures like Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Tribal Flames, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent efficiently. The inclusion of Leyline Binding and Leyline of the Guildpact helps to control the board while maintaining aggression. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast-paced and relentless in its pursuit of victory.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ulamog, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to cheat them into play. By utilizing instant speed reanimation spells and disruptive cards like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. The inclusion of other cards like Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler helps to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also providing additional card advantage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply early pressure on the opponent. The deck also utilizes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and finish off opponents. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and disruption, while cards like Voice of Victory and Thraben Charm offer utility and flexibility. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and relentless attack strategy, backed up by efficient removal spells and combat tricks.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast mana generation and card draw to set up for explosive turns where multiple spells can be cast in quick succession. The goal is to generate a large amount of mana through cards like Pyretic Ritual and Ruby Medallion, then use Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability to duplicate spells for maximum impact. With cards like Reckless Impulse and Glimpse the Impossible providing card draw, the deck aims to chain together spells to generate enough storm count to finish off the opponent with a lethal Grapeshot.
